name: Xinji Shaxi Group Co., Ltd
summary: Xinji Shaxi Group Co., Ltd, an investment holding company, operates and manages hospitality supplies and home furnishing shopping malls in the People's Republic of China. The company has five shopping malls, including three shopping malls for hospitality supplies and two shopping malls for home furnishings. It also rents hospitality supplies; provides exhibition management services; and operates an online shopping mall. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
